phrases.chinese: 一二三四五六七八九十
phrases.pinyin: yī èr sān sì wǔ liù qī bā jiǔ shí
phrases.english: One two three four five six seven eight nine ten

phrases.pinyin: shān shàng yǒu yí gè rén
phrases.english: There is a person on the mountain

phrases.pinyin: sān gè rén xiàng xià zǒu

phrases.chinese: 小草小小的，大树大大的
phrases.pinyin: xiǎo cǎo xiǎo xiǎo de, dà shù dà dà de
phrases.english: The grass is small, the tree is big

phrases.chinese: 大树小小的，大山大大的
phrases.pinyin: dà shù xiǎo xiǎo de, dà shān dà dà de
phrases.english: The tree is small, the mountain is big

phrases.chinese: 大山小小的，天空大大的
phrases.pinyin: dà shān xiǎo xiǎo de, tiānkōng dà dà de
phrases.english: The mountain is small, the sky is big

phrases.chinese: 天空大大的，太阳小小的
phrases.pinyin: tiānkōng dà dà de, tàiyáng xiǎo xiǎo de
phrases.english: The sky is big, the sun is small
No one is in the middle

phrases.chinese: 天空小小的，太阳大大的
phrases.pinyin: tiānkōng xiǎo xiǎo de, tàiyáng dà dà de
phrases.english: The sky is small, the sun is big

phrases.chinese: 太阳小小的，星星大大的
phrases.pinyin: tàiyáng xiǎo xiǎo de, xīngxing dà dà de
phrases.english: The sun is small, the stars are big

phrases.pinyin: wǒ xiǎo xiǎo de, bàba dà dà de
phrases.english: I am small, dad is big

phrases.pinyin: wǒ zài shān shàng kàn rìchū
phrases.english: I watch the sunrise from the mountain
There is a moon in the sky
It is raining from the sky
I love to ask mom questions

phrases.pinyin: yī shénme yī? yī rén yī
phrases.english: One what one? One person one

phrases.pinyin: èr shénme èr? èr xiǎo tù èr
phrases.english: Two what two? Two little rabbits two

phrases.pinyin: sān shénme sān? sān dà shān sān
phrases.english: Three what three? Three big mountains three
One two three, wooden person (freeze game)

phrases.pinyin: yí gè xīngqī yǒu qī tiān

phrases.chinese: 我看到天上有九只小鸟
phrases.pinyin: wǒ kàndào tiānshàng yǒu jiǔ zhī xiǎo niǎo
phrases.english: I see nine little birds in the sky

phrases.pinyin: sì shénme sì? sì fēi niǎo sì
phrases.english: Four what four? Four flying birds four

phrases.chinese: 五什么五？五小花五。五爱心五
phrases.pinyin: wǔ shénme wǔ? wǔ xiǎo huā wǔ. wǔ àixīn wǔ
phrases.english: Five what five? Five small flowers five. Five hearts five

phrases.pinyin: wǒ ài māma. māma ài wǒ
phrases.english: I love mom. Mom loves me

phrases.pinyin: shān shàng yǒu yì zhī dà shānyáng
phrases.english: There is a big goat on the mountain

phrases.pinyin: sān zhī xiǎo yáng shàng shān
phrases.english: Three little sheep go up the mountain

phrases.pinyin: shān shàng yǒu yī tóu dà shuǐniú
phrases.english: There is a big water buffalo on the mountain

phrases.pinyin: wǒ ài xiào, wǒ ài tiào
phrases.english: I love to laugh, I love to jump

phrases.pinyin: wǒ shàng qù le, wǒ xià lái le
phrases.english: I went up, I came down

phrases.pinyin: wǒ shì xiǎo mǎ, pǎo pǎo pǎo
phrases.english: I am a little horse, run run run

phrases.pinyin: wǒ de kuàilè shǎo bù liǎo
phrases.english: My happiness cannot be without it

phrases.pinyin: wǒ yǒu xiǎo shǒu, māma yǒu dà shǒu
phrases.english: I have small hands, Mom has big hands

phrases.pinyin: shān shàng yǒu hěn duō dà shí tou
phrases.english: There are many big rocks on the mountain
There is no one at the door

phrases.pinyin: wǒ shì niú, wǒ shì niǎo
phrases.english: I am a cow, I am a bird

phrases.pinyin: wǒ shì shān, wǒ shì yáng
phrases.english: I am a mountain, I am a sheep

phrases.pinyin: wǒ shì tàiyáng, yuèliàng, dà shù, cǎo
phrases.english: I am the sun, the moon, a big tree, and grass

phrases.pinyin: wǒ shì xīngxing, xiào xiào xiào
phrases.english: I am a star, laugh laugh laugh
I go to school during the day

phrases.pinyin: tiān shàng yǒu hěn duō bái yún
phrases.english: There are many white clouds in the sky

phrases.pinyin: yòu yí gè rén lái le
xiǎo mǎ zài shān shàng chī cǎo
phrases.english: The little horse is eating grass on the mountain

phrases.chinese: 太阳爱白云，白云高兴地跑，跑，跑。
phrases.pinyin: tàiyáng ài báiyún, báiyún gāoxìng de pǎo, pǎo, pǎo
phrases.english: The sun loves white clouds; the clouds happily run, run, run

phrases.chinese: 月亮爱星星，星星快乐地跳，跳，跳。
phrases.pinyin: yuèliàng ài xīngxing, xīngxing kuàilè de tiào, tiào, tiào
phrases.english: The moon loves the stars; the stars joyfully jump, jump, jump

phrases.chinese: 天空爱小鸟，小鸟飞，飞，飞。
phrases.pinyin: tiānkōng ài xiǎo niǎo, xiǎo niǎo fēi, fēi, fēi
phrases.english: The sky loves little birds; the little birds fly, fly, fly

phrases.chinese: 大地爱小草，小草笑，笑，笑。
phrases.pinyin: dàdì ài xiǎo cǎo, xiǎo cǎo xiào, xiào, xiào
phrases.english: The earth loves little grass; the little grass laughs, laughs, laughs

phrases.pinyin: shān shàng yǒu yí piàn dà nóngtián
phrases.english: There is a large farm field on the mountain

phrases.pinyin: nǐ yǒu jǐ gè hǎo péngyǒu
phrases.english: How many good friends do you have?

phrases.chinese: 棕色的熊，棕色的熊，你在看什么？
phrases.pinyin: zōngsè de xióng, zōngsè de xióng, nǐ zài kàn shénme
phrases.english: Brown bear, brown bear, what are you looking at?

phrases.chinese: 我看到一只红色的鸟在看我。
phrases.pinyin: wǒ kàndào yì zhī hóngsè de niǎo zài kàn wǒ
phrases.english: I see a red bird looking at me

phrases.chinese: 红色的鸟，红色的鸟，你在看什么？
phrases.pinyin: hóngsè de niǎo, hóngsè de niǎo, nǐ zài kàn shénme
phrases.english: Red bird, red bird, what are you looking at?

phrases.chinese: 我看到一只黄色的鸭子在看我。
phrases.pinyin: wǒ kàndào yì zhī huángsè de yāzi zài kàn wǒ
phrases.english: I see a yellow duck looking at me

phrases.chinese: 黄色的鸭子，黄色的鸭子，你在看什么？
phrases.pinyin: huángsè de yāzi, huángsè de yāzi, nǐ zài kàn shénme
phrases.english: Yellow duck, yellow duck, what are you looking at?

phrases.chinese: 我看到一匹蓝色的马在看我。
phrases.pinyin: wǒ kàndào yì pǐ lánsè de mǎ zài kàn wǒ
phrases.english: I see a blue horse looking at me

phrases.chinese: 蓝色的马，蓝色的马，你在看什么？
phrases.pinyin: lánsè de mǎ, lánsè de mǎ, nǐ zài kàn shénme
phrases.english: Blue horse, blue horse, what are you looking at?

phrases.chinese: 我看到一只绿色的青蛙在看我。
phrases.pinyin: wǒ kàndào yì zhī lǜsè de qīngwā zài kàn wǒ
phrases.english: I see a green frog looking at me

phrases.chinese: 绿色的青蛙，绿色的青蛙，你在看什么？
phrases.pinyin: lǜsè de qīngwā, lǜsè de qīngwā, nǐ zài kàn shénme
phrases.english: Green frog, green frog, what are you looking at?

phrases.chinese: 我看到一只紫色的猫在看我。
phrases.pinyin: wǒ kàndào yì zhī zǐsè de māo zài kàn wǒ
phrases.english: I see a purple cat looking at me

phrases.chinese: 紫色的猫，紫色的猫，你在看什么？
phrases.pinyin: zǐsè de māo, zǐsè de māo, nǐ zài kàn shénme
phrases.english: Purple cat, purple cat, what are you looking at?

phrases.chinese: 我看到一只白色的狗在看我。
phrases.pinyin: wǒ kàndào yì zhī báisè de gǒu zài kàn wǒ
phrases.english: I see a white dog looking at me

phrases.pinyin: yī jiā rén zài kàn jiémù
phrases.english: The family is watching a show.
There is no one on the mountain.

phrases.pinyin: wǒ kànjiàn yī zhī niǎo zài fēi

phrases.chinese: 白色的狗，白色的狗，你在看什么？
phrases.pinyin: báisè de gǒu, báisè de gǒu, nǐ zài kàn shénme
phrases.english: White dog, white dog, what are you looking at?

phrases.chinese: 我看到一只黑色的羊在看我。
phrases.pinyin: wǒ kàndào yì zhī hēisè de yáng zài kàn wǒ
phrases.english: I see a black sheep looking at me.

phrases.chinese: 黑色的羊，黑色的羊，你在看什么？
phrases.pinyin: hēisè de yáng, hēisè de yáng, nǐ zài kàn shénme
phrases.english: Black sheep, black sheep, what are you looking at?

phrases.chinese: 我看到一只金色的鱼在看我。
phrases.pinyin: wǒ kàndào yì zhī jīnsè de yú zài kàn wǒ
phrases.english: I see a gold fish looking at me.

phrases.chinese: 金色的鱼，金色的鱼，你在看什么？
phrases.pinyin: jīnsè de yú, jīnsè de yú, nǐ zài kàn shénme
phrases.english: Gold fish, gold fish, what are you looking at?

phrases.chinese: 我看到一个老师在看我。
phrases.pinyin: wǒ kàndào yí gè lǎoshī zài kàn wǒ
phrases.english: I see a teacher looking at me.

phrases.pinyin: lǎoshī, lǎoshī, nǐ zài kàn shénme
phrases.english: Teacher, teacher, what are you looking at?

phrases.chinese: 我看到一群孩子在看我。
phrases.pinyin: wǒ kàndào yì qún háizi zài kàn wǒ
phrases.english: I see a group of children looking at me.

phrases.chinese: 孩子们，孩子们，你们在看什么？
phrases.pinyin: háizimen, háizimen, nǐmen zài kàn shénme
phrases.english: Children, children, what are you looking at?

phrases.pinyin: tā shì yī gè nǚ háizi
tā shì yī gè nán háizi
yī zhī xiǎo niǎo fēi chūlái le
xiǎo tù tiào shàng tiào xià
phrases.english: The little rabbit jumps up and down.

phrases.pinyin: húdié shàng fēi fēi, xià fēi fēi
phrases.english: The butterfly flies up and down.

phrases.chinese: 我不是毛毛虫了，我好快乐。
phrases.pinyin: wǒ bú shì máomaochóng le, wǒ hǎo kuàilè
phrases.english: I’m not a caterpillar anymore; I’m so happy.

phrases.pinyin: shuǐ lǐ yǒu hěn duō xiǎo yú
phrases.english: There are many little fish in the water.

phrases.pinyin: shān shàng yǒu duō shǎo zhī yáng
phrases.english: How many sheep are on the mountain?

phrases.pinyin: wǒ yě xǐ huan dòng wù

phrases.english: There is no one at home.

phrases.pinyin: xiǎo yáng, wǒ kàn yī xià hǎo bù hǎo
phrases.english: Little lamb, may I take a look?

phrases.chinese: 小牛快来！去小兔家吃蛋糕。
phrases.pinyin: xiǎo niú kuài lái! qù xiǎo tù jiā chī dàng gāo
phrases.english: Little calf, come quickly! Let’s go to Little Rabbit’s house to eat cake.
The little flower is so pretty.

phrases.pinyin: shēng rì kuài lè, xiǎo tù
hǎo chī de shǎo bù liǎo
phrases.english: You can’t have a party without delicious food.

phrases.pinyin: wǒ de dàng gāo tài xiǎo le
wǒ men shì yī jiā rén
nǐ hé wǒ shì hǎo péng you
phrases.english: You and I are good friends.

phrases.pinyin: zhè lǐ yǒu hǎo duō rén

phrases.chinese: 我家有五口人，爷爷、奶奶、爸爸、妈妈和我。
phrases.pinyin: wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén, yé ye, nǎi nai, bà ba, mā ma hé wǒ
phrases.english: There are five people in my family: grandpa, grandma, dad, mom, and me.

phrases.pinyin: wǒ jiā yǒu jiǔ kǒu rén
phrases.english: There are nine people in my family.

phrases.pinyin: zhè shì wǒ de yé ye
zhè shì wǒ de nǎi nai
zhè shì wǒ de bà ba
zhè shì wǒ de mā ma
zhè shì wǒ de gē ge
zhè shì wǒ de jiě jie
zhè shì wǒ de mèi mei

phrases.chinese: 这是我的弟弟，他一岁了。
phrases.pinyin: zhè shì wǒ de dì di, tā yī suì le
phrases.english: This is my younger brother, he is one year old.

phrases.chinese: 弟弟爱我们，我们也爱弟弟。
phrases.pinyin: dì di ài wǒ men, wǒ men yě ài dì di
phrases.english: Little brother loves us, and we also love him.
Have or not / is there or not?
I am a primary school student.

phrases.chinese: 我的学校有很多老师和学生，有男生也有女生。
phrases.pinyin: wǒ de xué xiào yǒu hěn duō lǎo shī hé xué sheng, yǒu nán shēng yě yǒu nǚ shēng
phrases.english: My school has many teachers and students; there are boys and girls.

phrases.pinyin: wǒ ài wǒ de xué xiào
xiǎo niǎo zài tiān shàng fēi lái fēi qù
phrases.english: The little bird flies back and forth in the sky.

phrases.pinyin: xiǎo yú zài shuǐ lǐ yóu lái yóu qù
phrases.english: The little fish swims back and forth in the water.

phrases.pinyin: xiǎo mǎ zài dì shàng pǎo lái pǎo qù
phrases.english: The little horse runs back and forth on the ground.

phrases.chinese: 小牛和小羊在草地上吃草。
phrases.pinyin: xiǎo niú hé xiǎo yáng zài cǎo dì shàng chī cǎo
phrases.english: The calf and lamb eat grass on the field.

phrases.pinyin: lǜ lǜ de cǎo hěn hǎo chī
phrases.english: The green grass is very tasty!

phrases.chinese: 毛毛家门口有一个花园。
phrases.pinyin: máo mao jiā mén kǒu yǒu yī gè huā yuán
phrases.english: There is a garden at Maomao's house entrance.

phrases.chinese: 早上，毛毛在花园里玩，看见花儿开了。
phrases.pinyin: zǎo shang, máo mao zài huā yuán lǐ wán, kàn jiàn huā er kāi le
phrases.english: In the morning, Maomao played in the garden and saw the flowers bloom.

phrases.pinyin: huā er kāi le duō hǎo kàn
phrases.english: The flowers blooming look so beautiful!

phrases.pinyin: máo mao kàn le hǎo kāi xīn
phrases.english: Maomao felt very happy seeing them.

phrases.pinyin: zǎo shang, wǒ zài xué xiào xué zhōng wén
phrases.english: In the morning, I study Chinese at school.

phrases.chinese: 老师教我们说中文、写中文。
phrases.pinyin: lǎo shī jiāo wǒ men shuō zhōng wén, xiě zhōng wén
phrases.english: The teacher teaches us to speak and write Chinese.

phrases.chinese: 我们在中文班读书、写字和画画儿。
phrases.pinyin: wǒ men zài zhōng wén bān dú shū, xiě zì hé huà huà er
phrases.english: In the Chinese class, we read, write, and draw.

phrases.pinyin: wǒ xǐ huan xué zhōng wén

phrases.chinese: 今天早上，爸爸和我一起去公园里玩。
phrases.pinyin: jīn tiān zǎo shàng, bà ba hé wǒ yì qǐ qù gōng yuán lǐ wán
phrases.english: This morning, Dad and I went to the park to play.

phrases.chinese: 中午，我们在家里吃午饭。
phrases.pinyin: zhōng wǔ, wǒ men zài jiā lǐ chī wǔ fàn
phrases.english: At noon, we ate lunch at home.

phrases.chinese: 下午，我的好朋友云云来我们家和我一起画画。
phrases.pinyin: xià wǔ, wǒ de hǎo péng yǒu yún yún lái wǒ men jiā hé wǒ yì qǐ huà huà
phrases.english: In the afternoon, my good friend Yunyun came to our house to draw with me.

phrases.pinyin: wǒ men huà le huā hé cǎo dì
jīn tiān wǒ hěn kāi xīn

phrases.chinese: 早上，爸爸出门了，哥哥也出门了。
phrases.pinyin: zǎo shàng, bà ba chū mén le, gē ge yě chū mén le
phrases.english: In the morning, Dad went out, and older brother also went out.

phrases.chinese: 妈妈、妹妹和我没有出门。
phrases.pinyin: mā ma, mèi mei hé wǒ méi yǒu chū mén
phrases.english: Mum, younger sister, and I did not go out.

phrases.pinyin: wǒ men sān gè rén zài jiā
phrases.english: The three of us stayed at home.

phrases.chinese: 晚上，爸爸回家了，哥哥也回家了。
phrases.pinyin: wǎn shàng, bà ba huí jiā le, gē ge yě huí jiā le
phrases.english: In the evening, Dad came home, and older brother also came home.

phrases.pinyin: wǒ men yì jiā rén zài jiā
phrases.english: Our whole family is at home.
do not have; there is not
have or not; whether or not there is
